title: Mexico
html:
Mexico

Stub. Country bordering Austin/Texas — first surfaced as a planned trip destination in the Feb 3 March trip plan (Austin → Brownsville/Matamoros → La Pesca, MX) for the March visit. Cartel-activity flagged in 2026 03 06 emily visit itinerary as making the border "scary" — the cross-border road-trip portion was likely abandoned.

Likely also referenced incidentally across earlier travel-planning notes; densify-eligible.

Source summaries

  • 2026 02 03 emily and i march trip
  • 2026 03 06 emily visit itinerary
